issues_before_repair.message: Back matter heading was detected inside clean body.
Publisher header/footer boilerplate remains in body text.
Many figure/table caption paragraphs remain in body text.

issues_after_repair.message: Many figure/table caption paragraphs remain in body text.

repairs_applied.message: Removed back matter from clean body and parsed reference-like tail entries.
Trimmed title/authors/abstract/front matter before main body heading: ## 1. Introduction
Moved figure captions out of clean body.
Moved table captions out of clean body.
Moved table-like blocks out of clean body.
Normalized inline/display math spans inside clean body.
Dropped equation candidates that looked like prose/table labels rather than formulas.
Normalized formula spacing, common OCR symbols, and simple LaTeX temperature/unit forms.
Sorted numbered references after extraction order appeared scrambled.

formulas.original: { \begin{array} { r l } & { P _ { 1 } - P _ { 2 } : T _ { x ^ { \prime } = 0 } - T _ { x ^ { \prime } = a } = a \cos ( \alpha ) T _ { x } ^ { o } - a \sin ( \alpha ) T _ { y } ^ { o } } \\ { { \mathrm { U C 1 : ~ } } P _ { 3 } - P _ { 4 } : T _ { y ^ { \prime } = 0 } - T _ { y ^ { \prime } = b } = b \cos ( \beta ) T _ { x } ^ { o } + b \sin ( \beta ) T _ { y } ^ { o } } \\ & { P _ { 5 } - P _ { 6 } : T _ { z = 0 } - T _ { z = h } = h T _ { z } ^ { o } } \end{array} }\tag{ð16Þ}

formulas.original: \begin{array} { r l } & { P _ { 1 } - P _ { 2 } : T _ { x - 0 } - T _ { x - a } = a \cos ( x ) T _ { x } ^ { 0 } - a \sin ( x ) T _ { y } ^ { 0 } } \\ & { P _ { 3 } : T _ { y - 0 , x \leq a / 2 } + T _ { y - 0 , x \leq a / 2 } - 2 T _ { ( 0 , 0 , 0 ) } = - a \cos ( x ) T _ { x } ^ { 0 } + a \sin ( x ) T _ { y } ^ { 0 } } \\ { \mathrm { U C 2 ~ u n d e r ~ } q \mathrm { 0 } x \mathrm { ~ o r ~ } q \mathrm { 0 } y : \ } \\ & { P _ { 4 } : T _ { y - b / 2 , x \leq a / 2 } + T _ { y - b / 2 , x \leq a / 2 } - 2 T _ { ( 0 , 0 , 0 ) } = - ( a \cos ( x ) + b \cos ( \beta ) ) T _ { x } ^ { 0 } + ( a \sin ( \alpha ) - b \sin ( \beta ) ) T _ { y } ^ { 0 } } \\ & { P _ { 5 } - P _ { 6 } : T _ { z - 0 } - T _ { z \mathrm { a b } } = h T _ { z } ^ { 0 } } \end{array}\tag{ð17-1Þ}

formulas.original: { \begin{array} { r l } & { P _ { 1 } - P _ { 2 } : T _ { x - 0 } - T _ { x - a } = a \cos ( \alpha ) T _ { x } ^ { 0 } - a \sin ( \alpha ) T _ { y } ^ { 0 } } \\ & { P _ { 3 } : T _ { y = 0 , x \leqslant a / 2 } - T _ { y ^ { - 0 } , x ^ { \prime } \geqslant a / 2 } = a \cos ( \alpha ) T _ { x } ^ { 0 } - a \sin ( \alpha ) T _ { y } ^ { 0 } } \\ { { \mathrm { U C 2 ~ u n d e r ~ } } q _ { z } ^ { 0 } : } & { P _ { 4 } : T _ { y ^ { - b } / 2 , x ^ { \prime } \leqslant a / 2 } - T _ { y ^ { - b } / 2 , x \geqslant a / 2 } = b \cos ( \beta ) T _ { x } ^ { 0 } + b \sin ( \beta ) T _ { y } ^ { 0 } + a \cos ( \alpha ) T _ { x } ^ { 0 } - a \sin ( \alpha ) T _ { y } ^ { 0 } } \\ & { P _ { 5 } - P _ { 6 } : T _ { z = 0 } - T _ { z - h } = h T _ { z } ^ { 0 } } \end{array} }\tag{ð17-2Þ}
